title: Principal Instructional Designer at Adda247 Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Adda247 Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
